g.text: Draft Fig. 2: Wavelet-guided prototype adaptation mechanism

text.style: font-size: 10.5px; font-family: 'DejaVu Sans'; text-anchor: start; fill: #667085

g.text: High-frequency wavelet evidence gates which visual tokens are allowed to update CLIP text-side prototypes.
